changelog:
- WebRTC: Fixed offer/ACK race, bitrate floor tuning, Opus VBR params, TURN-friendly ICE watchdog, and far-mode AGC behavior.
- Camera: Fixed AE/AF capture sequencing, orientation/EXIF handling, and night/manual capture reliability across OEM devices.
- Audio PCM: Improved gain smoothing, denoiser bootstrap stability, strict frame guards, and playback buffering/worklet output quality.
- Backend: Optimized audio routing and stream recovery backoff logic for low-bandwidth stability.
